MINI MINUTES:

ATTY. JOANNA L. BROOKS OF LITTLER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 439-6282 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT ADP TOTALSOURCE, INC.'s DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - Demurrer is overruled with 15 days to respond. Paragraphs 3 and 12 allege that the named plaintiff and the putative class members were employed by the defendants. This is enough for pleading purposes. THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Richard Kramer, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/RAK)
